---
name: Methodology Improvement
about: Suggest a change to the Responsible AI methodology, templates, or examples
title: '[METHODOLOGY]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Which part of the framework does this affect?

- [ ] AI Readiness Quick Check
- [ ] Responsible AI Pilot Canvas
- [ ] AI Pilot Decision Report
- [ ] Pilot Partner Intake Form
- [ ] Architecture Patterns
- [ ] Compliance / Responsibility Matrix
- [ ] Business Diagnosis
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Current content or behavior

Describe what exists today.

## Proposed improvement

Describe what should change and why.

## Practical context

Is this based on:

- [ ] real-world implementation experience
- [ ] compliance / risk review
- [ ] business process work
- [ ] consulting / workshop experience
- [ ] academic or research source
- [ ] other

## Why this matters

Explain how the change improves responsibility, clarity, auditability, operational stability, or practical usefulness.

## Additional notes

Add links, examples, screenshots, or references if helpful.

Please do not include confidential, personal, customer, financial, health, HR, legal, security-sensitive, or proprietary information.
